message:
fix(server,conformance): skip transient errors in try_fulfill_blocked, shutdown TCP on disconnect, relax INFO CPU fixture

- try_fulfill_blocked: change all four blocking-op error paths (BLPOP,
  BRPOP, BZPOPMAX, BZPOPMIN) from returning the error to the client to
  continuing the key-scan loop, preventing a transient per-key error from
  aborting the entire blocking wait across a key list. XREAD/XREADGROUP
  error path similarly returns None (no data) rather than propagating.
- Server connection teardown: call stream.shutdown(Shutdown::Both) after
  deregistering from the poll registry so the OS-level TCP socket is
  cleanly closed on the server side.
- Conformance fixture: relax the INFO CPU test case from a hard bulk-
  string equality check to any_bulk, since CPU timing values are
  non-deterministic across runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
